description: Nordic digital healthcare provider with 34 physical clinics and 14M+ digital consultations. Offers video consultations, digital prescriptions, and in-person care. 4.9 App Store rating from 235,000+ reviews.
business_model: B2C - Direct to patients via regional healthcare contracts; B2B employer services
target_market: Sweden, Norway, Germany - consumers and employers
key_investors: Index Ventures, Creandum, Accel, General Atlantic
competitive_advantage: Hybrid digital-physical model, deepest clinical capabilities, highest app ratings, NLL integration

varden_fit.rationale: Major competitor in Nordics - benchmark for hybrid care delivery model
